name: Protide Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
summary: Protide Pharmaceuticals, Inc. discovers, develops, and commercializes technologies and processes in the areas of clinical cell therapy, regenerative medicine, transfusion medicine, cell engineering, and transplantation in the United States and internationally. It offers serum reducers, cell culture and processing products, stem cell cryopreservatives, and stem cell and regenerative research products. The company is based in Lake Zurich, Illinois.
